dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, we lost good people during {quest_origin}. {quest_stakes_The} gave their lives defending us, and {quest_threat_the} {quest_threat_is} still out there.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I cannot let their sacrifice go unanswered. The {enemy_type_plural} that did this are lurking {location_hint} near {quest_focus_the}. We need to {quest_action}. Hunt them down and make them answer for what they took from us.
dialogueChunks.outro: Those we lost were family to this settlement. Their memory demands justice.

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_threat_animate_The} killed people we cared about, {player_name}. {quest_stakes_human_The} {quest_stakes_human_was} out doing their work when they were taken from us. We found what was left.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The community is grieving and furious. The {enemy_type_plural} responsible are somewhere {location_hint} near {quest_focus_the}. We need to {quest_action} before {quest_time_pressure}. Take {quest_item} to help deal with them.
dialogueChunks.outro: We lay our people to rest soon. I want to tell them it is done.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, during {quest_origin}, {quest_threat_animate_the} killed {quest_stakes_human_the} in cold blood. The victim was kin to half this settlement.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The whole community wants justice. The {enemy_type_plural} are holed up {location_hint} near {quest_focus_the}. I need you to {quest_action} and put them down. Every one of them that falls is a debt repaid.
dialogueChunks.outro: The family deserves closure, and {quest_reward_hint} has been set aside for exactly this purpose.
